title: RefactorRunResult — outcome persisted to core.refactor_runs.result
description: JSON Schema for the result JSONB column on core.refactor_runs (src/will/governance/refactor_runner.py). Constructed inline after Flow/proposal execution completes. Required fields are always written on success; on failure the row status is 'failed' and result may be null. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (persistence-boundary contract). Uses .schema.json suffix — intentionally skipped by intent_validator.py (no governed_classes Python counterpart).

success.description: True if the refactor run concluded without unhandled error. Does not guarantee every proposal succeeded — check proposal outcomes individually.

message.description: Human-readable summary of the refactor outcome. 'Refactoring completed' on success; descriptive error string on failure.

proposal_ids.description: UUIDs of all autonomous_proposals created or correlated during this run. Empty list if no proposals were created or if proposal correlation failed.

proposal_count.description: len(proposal_ids). Redundant convenience field so consumers avoid parsing the array for a count.
